verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I look into the faces of people everywhere, Help me see lost souls in danger and headed to despair. Help me see the flame approaching around their fleeting days. Those who die without the Savior are lost to hell-fire's blaze.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Help me win the lost and see them in their need. Help me win the lost, salvation's cause to plead. Help me win the lost. O Spirit, please empower! Help me win the lost. O, use me now this hour.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: As I gaze into the future and see the lost man's doom, Help me always to remember there is an empty tomb. Jesus died for every sinner; He won the victory. Jesus lives! He is the Savior! Salvation's offered free!
